docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,375.00 FILED BY MEDEL RAMON VILLALOBOS LUCIA AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ NELSON A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEDEL RAMON VILLALOBOS LUCIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ NELSON A. $4,375.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,383.00, PAYABLE AS FOLLOWS; $125 PAYABLE ON 11/1/92,12/1/9 1/1/93, 3/1/93, BAL PAID IN FULL BY 3/1/93, STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGM. TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED, NO SUCH #.
CERT. RECEIPT TO STEPHEN LEE RETURNED SIGNED.
